title: tridax tenuifolia var. tenuifolia
intro: Tridax tenuifolia var. tenuifolia, also known as False Daisy or Coat Button Flower, is a herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. The herbal preparations of Tridax tenuifolia var. tenuifolia include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
